mapper.select: /*selectAttackDeathStats*/ SELECT COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ATTACKS, SUM(CASE WHEN JOB = '헌터' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS HUNTER_ATTACKS, SUM(CASE WHEN DEATH_YN = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS TOTAL_DEATHS FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}

/*selectKillStats*/ SELECT bl.TARGET_MON_LV AS MON_NO, m.MON_NAME AS MON_NAME, COUNT(*) AS KILL_COUNT, SUM(DECODE(BL.NIGHTMARE_YN,'1',1,0)) AS NM_KILL_COUNT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG bl JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO m ON m.MON_NO = bl.TARGET_MON_LV WHERE bl.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND bl.KILL_YN = 1 GROUP BY bl.TARGET_MON_LV, m.MON_NAME ORDER BY MON_NO DESC
SELECT MON_NO, MON_NAME, MON_HP, MON_ATK, MON_EXP, MON_DROP, MON_PATTEN, MON_LV,MON_NOTE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO ORDER BY MON_NO

/*selectOngoingBattle*/ SELECT monNo, totalDealtDmg, luckyYn,beforeJobSkillYn FROM ( SELECT TARGET_MON_LV AS monNo, NVL(SUM(ATK_DMG), 0) AS totalDealtDmg, MAX(TO_NUMBER(LUCKY_YN)) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY INSERT_DATE) AS luckyYn, MAX(JOB_SKILL_YN) KEEP (DENSE_RANK LAST ORDER BY INSERT_DATE) AS beforeJobSkillYn, MAX(INSERT_DATE) AS lastTime FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND NOW_YN = '1' GROUP BY TARGET_MON_LV ORDER BY lastTime DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: /*updateUserAfterBattle*/ UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER SET LV = #{newLv}, EXP_CUR = #{newExpCur}, EXP_NEXT = #{newExpNext}, HP_CUR = #{newHpCur}, HP_MAX = #{newHpMax}, ATK_MIN = #{newAtkMin}, ATK_MAX = #{newAtkMax}, CRIT_RATE = #{critRate}, HP_REGEN = #{hpRegen}, PROC_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER (USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, LV, EXP_CUR, EXP_NEXT, HP_CUR, HP_MAX, HP_REGEN, ATK_MIN, ATK_MAX, CRIT_RATE, CRIT_DMG, INSERT_DATE, TARGET_MON) VALUES (#{userName}, #{roomName},1, 0, 100, 10, 10, 2, 1, 5, 10, 150, SYSDATE, #{targetMonNo})
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM WHERE ITEM_NAME = #{itemName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY (USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, ITEM_ID, QTY, DEL_YN, GAIN_TYPE, INSERT_DATE) VALUES (#{userName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{roomName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemId,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{qty,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, NVL(#{delYn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, '0'), #{gainType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select:
/*selectInventorySummary*/ SELECT x.ITEM_ID, CASE WHEN x.GAIN_TYPE = 'DROP3' THEN '빛' || NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, '알 수 없음') WHEN x.GAIN_TYPE = 'DROP5' THEN '어둠' || NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, '알 수 없음') WHEN x.GAIN_TYPE = 'DROP9' THEN '음양' || NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, '알 수 없음') WHEN x.GAIN_TYPE = 'STEAL' THEN NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, '알 수 없음') || '조각' ELSE NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, '알 수 없음') END AS ITEM_NAME, '1' AS SELLABLE_YN, -- 빛템도 판매 가능 x.TOTAL_QTY FROM ( SELECT ITEM_ID, GAIN_TYPE, SUM(QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND DEL_YN = '0' GROUP BY ITEM_ID, GAIN_TYPE ) x LEFT JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM t ON t.ITEM_ID = x.ITEM_ID WHERE x.TOTAL_QTY > 0 ORDER BY NVL(t.ITEM_NAME, 'ZZZ'), x.ITEM_ID

WITH SP_SUM AS ( SELECT SUM( score * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN score_ext IS NULL OR score_ext='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(score_ext) - ASCII('a') + 1 END ) ) AS total_sp FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE user_name = #{userName} AND new_yn='1' )
SELECT ROUND(SIGN(total_sp) * ABS(total_sp) / POWER(10000, unit_idx),2) AS score, CASE WHEN unit_idx=0 THEN '' ELSE CHR(ASCII('a') + unit_idx - 1) END AS score_ext FROM ( SELECT total_sp, CASE WHEN total_sp=0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(LOG(10000, ABS(total_sp))) END unit_idx FROM SP_SUM )

SELECT /* selectInventoryRowsForSale */ ROWID AS RID,ITEM_ID, QTY, NVL(GAIN_TYPE,'DROP') AS GAIN_TYPE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND ITEM_ID = #{itemId} AND NVL(DEL_YN,'0') != '1' AND ITEM_ID BETWEEN 101 AND 3000 ORDER BY INSERT_DATE ASC, ROWID

SELECT ROWID AS RID,ITEM_ID, QTY, NVL(GAIN_TYPE,'DROP') AS GAIN_TYPE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND NVL(DEL_YN,'0') != '1' AND ITEM_ID BETWEEN 101 AND 3000 ORDER BY INSERT_DATE ASC, ROWID
mapper.update: UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY SET DEL_YN = '1' WHERE ROWID = #{rid}

UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY SET DEL_YN = '1' WHERE ROWID IN
#{rid}
UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY SET QTY = #{newQty} WHERE ROWID = #{rid}
mapper.select:
/*selectItemSellPriceList*/ SELECT ITEM_ID , ITEM_SELL_PRICE , ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM WHERE ITEM_ID IN
#{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TBOT_POINT_RANK (USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, SCORE,SCORE_EXT, INSERT_DATE, CMD, NEW_YN) VALUES (#{userName}, #{roomName}, #{score},#{scoreExt}, SYSDATE, #{cmd}, '1')
mapper.select: SELECT NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.atk_min * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 -- qty >= 4 END )), 0) AS ATK_MIN, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.atk_max * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS ATK_MAX, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.atk_cri * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS ATK_CRI, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.hp_regen * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS HP_REGEN, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.hp_max * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS HP_MAX, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.cri_dmg * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS CRI_DMG, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.hp_max_rate * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS HP_MAX_RATE, NVL(SUM( ROUND(i.atk_max_rate * CASE WHEN inv.qty = 1 THEN 1.0 WHEN inv.qty = 2 THEN 1.3 WHEN inv.qty = 3 THEN 1.5 ELSE 1.6 END )), 0) AS ATK_MAX_RATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY inv JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i ON i.item_id = inv.item_id WHERE inv.user_name = #{userName} AND inv.del_yn = '0' AND i.item_type in ('MARKET2','MARKET','BAG_OPEN','BAG_OPEN_NM','MASTER','ACHV')

SELECT i.item_id, i.item_name, i.item_sell_price, i.atk_min, i.atk_max, i.atk_cri, i.hp_regen, i.hp_max, i.cri_dmg, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY inv WHERE inv.user_name = #{userName}
AND inv.item_id = i.item_id AND inv.del_yn = '0' ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS owned_yn FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i WHERE i.item_type in ( 'MARKET','MARKET2') ORDER BY i.item_id

SELECT i.item_id, i.item_name, i.item_sell_price, i.atk_min, i.atk_max, i.atk_cri, i.hp_regen, i.hp_max, i.cri_dmg FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i WHERE i.item_type in ('MARKET','MARKET2') AND i.item_id = #{itemId}

SELECT i.ITEM_ID, i.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_SELL_PRICE, i.ITEM_TYPE, NVL(i.ATK_MIN, 0) AS ATK_MIN, NVL(i.ATK_MAX, 0) AS ATK_MAX, NVL(i.ATK_CRI, 0) AS ATK_CRI, NVL(i.HP_REGEN, 0) AS HP_REGEN, NVL(i.HP_MAX, 0) AS HP_MAX, NVL(i.CRI_DMG, 0) AS CRI_DMG, NVL(i.HP_MAX_RATE, 0) AS HP_MAX_RATE, NVL(i.ATK_MAX_RATE, 0) AS ATK_MAX_RATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i WHERE i.ITEM_TYPE in ('MARKET','MARKET2') ORDER BY i.ITEM_ID

/*selectItemDetailById*/ SELECT i.ITEM_ID, i.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_SELL_PRICE, i.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT, i.ITEM_TYPE, NVL(i.ATK_MIN, 0) AS ATK_MIN, NVL(i.ATK_MAX, 0) AS ATK_MAX, NVL(i.ATK_CRI, 0) AS ATK_CRI, NVL(i.HP_REGEN, 0) AS HP_REGEN, NVL(i.HP_MAX, 0) AS HP_MAX, NVL(i.CRI_DMG, 0) AS CRI_DMG, NVL(i.HP_MAX_RATE, 0) AS HP_MAX_RATE, NVL(i.ATK_MAX_RATE, 0) AS ATK_MAX_RATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i WHERE i.ITEM_ID = #{itemId}

/* selectMarketItemsWithOwned */ SELECT i.ITEM_ID, i.ITEM_NAME, i.ITEM_SELL_PRICE, i.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT, i.ITEM_TYPE, NVL(i.ATK_MIN,0) AS ATK_MIN, NVL(i.ATK_MAX,0) AS ATK_MAX, NVL(i.ATK_CRI,0) AS ATK_CRI, NVL(i.HP_REGEN,0) AS HP_REGEN, NVL(i.HP_MAX,0) AS HP_MAX, NVL(i.CRI_DMG,0) AS CRI_DMG, NVL(i.HP_MAX_RATE,0) AS HP_MAX_RATE, NVL(i.ATK_MAX_RATE,0) AS ATK_MAX_RATE,
NVL(inv.OWN_QTY, 0) AS OWN_QTY,
CASE WHEN NVL(inv.OWN_QTY, 0) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS OWNED_YN,
CASE WHEN i.ITEM_ID BETWEEN 100 AND 199 OR i.ITEM_ID BETWEEN 200 AND 299 OR i.ITEM_ID BETWEEN 400 AND 499 THEN CASE WHEN NVL(inv.OWN_QTY, 0) >= 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ELSE CASE WHEN NVL(inv.OWN_QTY, 0) >= 1 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END END AS MAXED_YN, I.INSERT_DATE
FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM i
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT inv.ITEM_ID, inv.USER_NAME, inv.ROOM_NAME, SUM(inv.QTY) AS OWN_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY inv WHERE inv.DEL_YN = '0' GROUP BY inv.ITEM_ID, inv.USER_NAME, inv.ROOM_NAME ) inv ON inv.ITEM_ID = i.ITEM_ID AND inv.USER_NAME = #{userName} WHERE i.ITEM_TYPE in ( 'MARKET','MARKET2','POTION') ORDER BY CASE WHEN i.ITEM_ID >= 1000 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, CASE WHEN i.ITEM_ID >= 1000 THEN i.ITEM_ID END ASC, CASE WHEN i.ITEM_ID < 1000 THEN i.ITEM_ID END DESC

/* selectLastBattleLog */ SELECT /*+ INDEX_DESC(B PK_TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATLLE_LOG) */ B.DEATH_YN, B.TARGET_MON_LV FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG B WHERE B.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND B.INSERT_DATE >= SYSDATE - (5 / 24 / 60) AND ROWNUM = 1
SELECT MAX( INSERT_DATE + CASE WHEN DEATH_YN = '1' THEN (5 / 24 / 60) ELSE 0 END ) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG B WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND (MON_DMG > 0 OR DEATH_YN = '1')

SELECT USER_NAME, LV, EXP_CUR, EXP_NEXT, JOB FROM ( SELECT u.USER_NAME, u.LV, u.EXP_CUR, u.EXP_NEXT, U.JOB, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY u.LV DESC, u.EXP_CUR DESC, u.USER_NAME ASC) AS RN FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER u WHERE U.PROC_DATE > SYSDATE-3 ) WHERE RN <= 7 ORDER BY RN

SELECT MON_NO, MON_NAME, USER_NAME, KILL_COUNT FROM ( SELECT bl.TARGET_MON_LV AS MON_NO, m.MON_NAME AS MON_NAME, bl.USER_NAME AS USER_NAME, COUNT(*) AS KILL_COUNT, DENSE_RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY bl.TARGET_MON_LV ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC ) AS RNK FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG bl JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO m ON m.MON_NO = bl.TARGET_MON_LV WHERE bl.KILL_YN = 1 GROUP BY bl.TARGET_MON_LV, m.MON_NAME, bl.USER_NAME ) WHERE RNK = 1 AND KILL_COUNT >= 50 ORDER BY MON_NO, USER_NAME

SELECT m.MON_NO, m.MON_NAME, m.MON_LV, fc.FIRST_CLEAR_USER, CASE WHEN FC.FIRST_CLEAR_DATE > SYSDATE - 7 THEN TO_CHAR(FC.FIRST_CLEAR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') ELSE TO_CHAR(FC.FIRST_CLEAR_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') END AS FIRST_CLEAR_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bl.TARGET_MON_LV AS MON_NO, MIN(bl.INSERT_DATE) AS FIRST_CLEAR_DATE, MIN(bl.USER_NAME) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY bl.INSERT_DATE) AS FIRST_CLEAR_USER FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG bl WHERE bl.KILL_YN = 1 GROUP BY bl.TARGET_MON_LV ) fc ON fc.MON_NO = m.MON_NO WHERE fc.FIRST_CLEAR_USER IS NOT NULL ORDER BY m.MON_NO
/*selectAchvCountsGlobalAll*/ SELECT CMD, COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN = '1' AND CMD LIKE 'ACHV_%' GROUP BY CMD

/*selectAchievementsByUser*/ SELECT CMD, SCORE, USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, INSERT_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND CMD LIKE 'ACHV_%' ORDER BY CASE WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_FIRST_CLEAR_MON_%' THEN 1 WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL_TOTAL_%' THEN 2 WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL%_MON_%' THEN 3 WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_DEATH%' THEN 4 ELSE 9 END, -- 2순위: 몬스터번호 or 총킬조건 숫자(각 패턴에 맞게) CASE WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_FIRST_CLEAR_MON_%' THEN -TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CMD, '[0-9]+$')) WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL_TOTAL_%' THEN -TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CMD, '[0-9]+$')) WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL%_MON_%' THEN -TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CMD, '[0-9]+$')) -- MON_뒤 숫자 (몬스터 번호) WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_DEATH%' THEN -TO_NUMBER(REGEXP_SUBSTR(CMD, '[0-9]+$')) ELSE NULL END, -- 3순위: 같은 MON에서 50 → 100 순 CASE WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL50_MON_%' THEN 1 WHEN CMD LIKE 'ACHV_KILL100_MON_%' THEN 2 ELSE 0 END

/*selectDailyAttackCounts*/ SELECT TRUNC(INSERT_DATE) AS ATTACK_DAY, COUNT(1) AS ATK_CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND INSERT_DATE < SYSDATE GROUP BY TRUNC(INSERT_DATE) ORDER BY ATTACK_DAY

/*selectRisingStarsTop5Last6h*/ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME, (SELECT U.JOB FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER U WHERE U.USER_NAME = A.USER_NAME AND ROWNUM=1) AS JOB, COUNT(*) AS ATK_CNT, MAX(INSERT_DATE) AS LAST_ATTACK FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG A WHERE INSERT_DATE >= SYSDATE - (3/24) AND ROOM_NAME NOT IN ('람쥐봇 문의방','test123') GROUP BY USER_NAME ORDER BY ATK_CNT DESC, LAST_ATTACK DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT NVL(I.INV_SP,0) + NVL(P.POINT_SP,0) AS TOT_SP, U.USER_NAME, NVL(B.ATK_CNT,0) AS ATK_CNT, NVL(B.DEATH_CNT,0) AS DEATH_CNT, U.LV
FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER U
LEFT JOIN ( /* INVENTORY SP 계산 */ SELECT A.USER_NAME, SUM( CASE WHEN A.GAIN_TYPE = 'BUY_MERCHANT' THEN ROUND(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE * 0.9) ELSE B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE END * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT IS NULL OR B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) * A.QTY ) AS INV_SP
FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY A JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_ID
WHERE A.GAIN_TYPE NOT IN ('DROP','DROP3','DROP5','DROP9','STEAL') AND A.DEL_YN='0'
GROUP BY A.USER_NAME
) I ON U.USER_NAME = I.USER_NAME
LEFT JOIN ( /* POINT LOG SP 계산 */ SELECT USER_NAME, SUM( SCORE * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN SCORE_EXT IS NULL OR SCORE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(SCORE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) ) AS POINT_SP
FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN='1'
GROUP BY USER_NAME
) P ON U.USER_NAME = P.USER_NAME
LEFT JOIN ( /* 전투 통계 */ SELECT USER_NAME, COUNT(*) AS ATK_CNT, SUM(CASE WHEN DEATH_YN='1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS DEATH_CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG GROUP BY USER_NAME
) B ON U.USER_NAME = B.USER_NAME WHERE NVL(I.INV_SP, 0) + NVL(P.POINT_SP, 0) > 100000000 ORDER BY TOT_SP DESC

/*selectOngoingChallengesForUnclearedBosses*/ SELECT ob.TARGET_MON_LV AS MON_NO, m.MON_NAME AS MON_NAME, ob.USER_NAME AS USER_NAME, u.JOB AS JOB, u.LV AS LV, TO_CHAR(ob.START_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS START_TIME, m.MON_HP AS MON_HP, GREATEST(m.MON_HP - ob.TOTAL_ATK, 0) AS REMAIN_HP FROM ( SELECT bl.USER_NAME, bl.ROOM_NAME, bl.TARGET_MON_LV, MIN(bl.INSERT_DATE) AS START_TIME, NVL(SUM(bl.ATK_DMG), 0) AS TOTAL_ATK FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG bl WHERE bl.NOW_YN = '1' GROUP BY bl.USER_NAME, bl.ROOM_NAME, bl.TARGET_MON_LV ) ob JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO m ON m.MON_NO = ob.TARGET_MON_LV JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_USER u ON u.USER_NAME = ob.USER_NAME
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG b2 WHERE b2.TARGET_MON_LV = ob.TARGET_MON_LV AND b2.KILL_YN = 1 ) ORDER BY m.MON_NO, ob.START_TIME, ob.USER_NAME
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE ROOM_NAME = #{roomName} AND BUFF_YN = '1'
mapper.update: UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG SET BUFF_YN = '0' WHERE ROOM_NAME = #{roomName} AND BUFF_YN = '1'
mapper.select: /*selectDosaBuffInfo*/ SELECT USER_NAME, LV, INSERT_DATE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE ROOM_NAME = #{roomName} AND BUFF_YN = '1' and rownum=1 ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC

/* selectTotalEarnedSp */ SELECT ROUND( SIGN(total_sp) * ABS(total_sp) / POWER(10000, unit_idx), 2 ) AS score, CASE WHEN unit_idx = 0 THEN '' ELSE CHR(ASCII('a') + unit_idx - 1) END AS score_ext FROM ( SELECT total_sp, CASE WHEN total_sp = 0 THEN 0 ELSE FLOOR(LOG(10000, ABS(total_sp))) END AS unit_idx FROM ( SELECT NVL( ( SELECT SUM( A.SCORE * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN A.SCORE_EXT IS NULL OR A.SCORE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(A.SCORE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) ) FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK A WHERE A.NEW_YN='1' AND A.USER_NAME=#{userName} ),0 ) + NVL( ( SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN A.GAIN_TYPE='BUY_MERCHANT' THEN ROUND(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE*0.9) ELSE B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE END * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT IS NULL OR B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) * A.QTY ) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY A JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM B ON A.ITEM_ID=B.ITEM_ID WHERE A.USER_NAME=#{userName} AND A.GAIN_TYPE NOT IN ('DROP','DROP3','DROP5','DROP9','STEAL') AND A.DEL_YN='0' ),0 ) AS total_sp FROM DUAL ) )

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME, SUM(QTY) AS STEAL_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE NVL(GAIN_TYPE, 'DROP') = 'STEAL' GROUP BY USER_NAME, ROOM_NAME ORDER BY SUM(QTY) DESC, USER_NAME ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME, COUNT(*) AS ACHV_CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN = '1' AND CMD LIKE 'ACHV%' GROUP BY USER_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC, USER_NAME ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT b.TARGET_MON_LV, mi.MON_NAME, mi.MON_HP AS MON_MAX_HP FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG b JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_MON_INFO mi ON b.TARGET_MON_LV = mi.MON_NO WHERE b.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND NVL(b.NOW_YN, '1') = '1' AND NVL(b.KILL_YN, '0') = '0' ORDER BY b.INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
/*selectAchvCountsGlobal*/ SELECT CMD, COUNT(1) AS CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN = '1' AND USER_NAME = #{userName} AND CMD LIKE 'ACHV_%' GROUP BY CMD

SELECT NVL(SUM(QTY), 0) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND ITEM_ID in ('91','92') AND DEL_YN = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY SET DEL_YN = '1' WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND ITEM_ID in ('91','92') AND DEL_YN = '0' AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: SELECT ITEM_ID FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM WHERE ITEM_TYPE = 'BAG_OPEN'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USER_NAME AS userName, ROOM_NAME AS roomName, INSERT_DATE AS insertDate FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE ITEM_ID in ( '91' , '92' ) -- 가방 ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT gain, userName, roomName, insertDate FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(C.SCORE) || ' ' || NVL(C.SCORE_EXT,'')|| '' AS gain, C.USER_NAME AS userName, C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, C.INSERT_DATE AS insertDate FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK C WHERE C.NEW_YN = '1' AND C.CMD = 'BAG_OPEN_SP' UNION ALL SELECT B.ITEM_NAME AS gain, A.USER_NAME AS userName, A.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, A.INSERT_DATE AS insertDate FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY A JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM B ON A.ITEM_ID = B.ITEM_ID WHERE A.GAIN_TYPE in ('BAG_OPEN','BAG_OPEN_NM') ) ORDER BY insertDate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN = '1' AND CMD = 'BAG_OPEN_SP' AND USER_NAME = #{userName}

SELECT NVL(SUM(x.SCORE), 0) AS sumScore FROM ( SELECT SCORE FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK WHERE NEW_YN = '1' AND CMD = 'BAG_OPEN_SP' AND USER_NAME = #{userName}
ORDER BY INSERT_DATE DESC ) x WHERE ROWNUM <= 10

SELECT NVL(SUM(QTY), 0) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND GAIN_TYPE IN ('DROP','DROP3','DROP5','DROP9','STEAL') AND NVL(DEL_YN, '0') = '1'

SELECT GAIN_TYPE, SUM(QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND GAIN_TYPE IN ('DROP3', 'DROP5','DROP9') GROUP BY GAIN_TYPE
SELECT JOB AS JOB, NVL(SUM(job_skill_yn), 0) AS TOTAL_SKILL_USE FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} GROUP BY JOB

SELECT ATK_BONUS, CRI_DMG_BONUS FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_DAILY_BUFF WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}
AND BUFF_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_DAILY_BUFF T USING ( SELECT #{roomName} AS ROOM_NAME, #{userName} AS USER_NAME, TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS BUFF_DATE, #{atkBonus} AS ATK_BONUS, #{criDmgBonus} AS CRI_DMG_BONUS FROM DUAL ) S ON ( T.USER_NAME = S.USER_NAME AND T.BUFF_DATE = S.BUFF_DATE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.ATK_BONUS = S.ATK_BONUS, T.CRI_DMG_BONUS = S.CRI_DMG_BONUS, T.UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (ROOM_NAME, USER_NAME, BUFF_DATE, ATK_BONUS, CRI_DMG_BONUS, INSERT_DATE, UPDATE_DATE) VALUES (S.ROOM_NAME, S.USER_NAME, S.BUFF_DATE, S.ATK_BONUS, S.CRI_DMG_BONUS, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_JOB_MASTER WHERE MASTER_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
mapper.update: MERGE INTO TBOT_POINT_NEW_JOB_MASTER M USING ( SELECT JOB, TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS MASTER_DATE, USER_NAME, ATK_CNT FROM ( SELECT JOB, USER_NAME, ATK_CNT, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY JOB ORDER BY ATK_CNT DESC, USER_NAME ASC ) AS RN FROM ( SELECT BL.JOB, BL.USER_NAME, COUNT(1) AS ATK_CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_BATTLE_LOG BL WHERE TRUNC(BL.INSERT_DATE) = TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 1 AND BL.JOB IS NOT NULL AND BL.ROOM_NAME not in ('람쥐봇 문의방','test123') GROUP BY BL.JOB, BL.USER_NAME HAVING COUNT(1) >50 ) ) WHERE RN = 1 ) S ON (M.JOB = S.JOB AND M.MASTER_DATE = S.MASTER_DATE) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (JOB, MASTER_DATE, USER_NAME, ATK_CNT, INSERT_DATE, UPDATE_DATE) VALUES (S.JOB, S.MASTER_DATE, S.USER_NAME, S.ATK_CNT, SYSDATE, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: /*selectIsTodayJobMasterAll*/ SELECT JOB, USER_NAME, ATK_CNT FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_JOB_MASTER WHERE MASTER_DATE = TRUNC(SYSDATE) ORDER BY JOB ASC, ATK_CNT DESC

SELECT CASE WHEN total_sp < 5000000 THEN 50000 ELSE 50000 + ROUND((total_sp - 5000000)/1000000,2)*10000 END AS BAG_REWARD_CAP FROM ( SELECT NVL(inv_sp,0) + NVL(rank_sp,0) AS total_sp FROM ( SELECT SUM( ( CASE WHEN A.GAIN_TYPE='BUY_MERCHANT' THEN ROUND(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE*0.9) ELSE B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE END ) * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT IS NULL OR B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(B.ITEM_SELL_PRICE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) * A.QTY ) AS inv_sp FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY A JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM B ON A.ITEM_ID=B.ITEM_ID WHERE A.GAIN_TYPE NOT IN ('DROP','DROP3','DROP5','DROP9','STEAL') AND A.DEL_YN='0' AND A.USER_NAME=#{userName} ), ( SELECT SUM( A1.SCORE * POWER( 10000, CASE WHEN A1.SCORE_EXT IS NULL OR A1.SCORE_EXT='' THEN 0 ELSE ASCII(A1.SCORE_EXT)-ASCII('a')+1 END ) ) AS rank_sp FROM TBOT_POINT_RANK A1 WHERE A1.NEW_YN='1' AND A1.USER_NAME=#{userName} ) )

/*selectTotalDropItems*/ SELECT I.ITEM_ID, IT.ITEM_NAME, I.GAIN_TYPE, SUM(I.QTY) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY I JOIN TBOT_POINT_NEW_ITEM IT ON I.ITEM_ID = IT.ITEM_ID WHERE I.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND I.GAIN_TYPE IN ('DROP','DROP2','DROP3','DROP5','DROP9','STEAL') AND I.ITEM_ID < 50 GROUP BY I.ITEM_ID, IT.ITEM_NAME, I.GAIN_TYPE ORDER BY I.ITEM_ID DESC, I.GAIN_TYPE
SELECT NVL(SUM(QTY), 0) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND ITEM_ID IN ('91','92','93')
SELECT count(1) FROM TBOT_POINT_NEW_INVENTORY A WHERE INSERT_DATE BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE) AND SYSDATE AND A.ITEM_ID IN (91,92) AND A.USER_NAME = #{userName}
SELECT * FROM tbot_point_new_special_buff WHERE SYSDATE BETWEEN START_TIME AND END_TIME AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tbot_point_new_special_buff ( FLAG_CODE, EFFECT_TYPE, EFFECT_VALUE, START_TIME, END_TIME, INSERT_DATE ) VALUES ( #{flagCode}, #{effectType}, #{effectValue}, SYSDATE, TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'MI') + (#{durationMin} / 1440), SYSDATE )
